{"id":"project-LICHEN-h1db","title":"SCHC: icmpv6_checksum accepts size_t but truncates to uint16_t","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/schc/schc.c
Lines: 661-668

The icmpv6_checksum function signature accepts size_t len:

```c
static uint16_t icmpv6_checksum(const uint8_t src[16], const uint8_t dst[16],
                                const uint8_t *icmpv6_payload, size_t len)
{
    uint32_t sum = pseudo_sum(src, dst, IPV6_NH_ICMPV6, len);  // len truncated here!
```

But pseudo_sum expects uint16_t:

```c
static uint32_t pseudo_sum(const uint8_t src[16], const uint8_t dst[16],
                           uint8_t next_header, uint16_t length)
```

If len > 65535, it silently truncates, causing incorrect checksum calculation.

Current state:
- All callers check icmp_len <= UINT16_MAX before calling (lines 1069, 1144, 1220)
- So this is not currently exploitable

Risk:
- Future callers might forget the check
- Latent bug / API footgun

Fix: Either:
1. Change icmpv6_checksum signature to take uint16_t and let callers cast explicitly
2. Add assert(len <= UINT16_MAX) in icmpv6_checksum
3. Return error if len > UINT16_MAX","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:54:20.32957Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:54:20.329597Z"}


But pseudo_sum expects uint16_t:

```c

                           uint8_t next_header, uint16_t length)
```

If len > 65535, it silently truncates, causing incorrect checksum calculation.

Current state:

2. Add assert(len <= UINT16_MAX) in icmpv6_checksum
3. Return error if len > UINT16_MAX","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:54:20.32957Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:19:27.80655698Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:19:27.80655698Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:24:27.80655698Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:19:27.80655698Z"}

new_value: Signature changed to uint16_t + explicit casts added to all callers in schc.c (already present in current code). Bounds checks prevent truncation. Matches fix option 1 from bead. Verified via grep and build.

new_value: {"notes":"Commit: cb1b1d9ce. The icmpv6_checksum already uses uint16_t len with explicit casts in all callers and pre-checks for \u003eUINT16_MAX. Fix implemented previously."}
